SULLIVAN RUN IN BUTLER, PA WENT OUT OF ITS BANKS DUE TO HEAVY RAINFALL IN A SHORT PERIOD OF TIME. BUTLER COUNTY EMS AND MEDIA OUTLETS REPORTED FLOODING AT THE INTERSECTION OF W JEFFERSON ST AND W CUNNINGHAM ST. FLOODING DUE TO SULLIVAN RUN ALSO OCCURRED AT THE INTERSECTION OF W BRADY ST AND HAYES AVE... AND ADDITIONAL NEARBY STREETS. MULTIPLE CARS STUCK AND AT LEAST 1 BASEMENT FLOODED. DECKERS CREEK IS OUT OF ITS BANKS AND FLOODING 6-10 MOBILE HOMES. WATER IS INTO THE NEARBY VEHICLES. THE FIRE DEPARTMENT IS GOING DOOR TO DOOR EVACUATING RESIDENTS. ROUTE 7 IS IMPASSIBLE.
